data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by Seven Coins
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from El Salvador's Ministry of Finance reveals that the country has increased its Bitcoin holdings by seven coins over the past week. El Salvador now possesses a total of 6,278.18 Bitcoins, valued at over $719 million.

data.title: Early Bitcoin Holder Converts Assets to Ethereum in Major Transaction
data.description:
According to PANews, a significant transaction has been observed by Lookonchain involving an early Bitcoin holder who transferred 6,000 Bitcoins, valued at approximately $689. 5 million, to purchase Ethereum. The address has accumulated a total of 278,490 Ethereum, worth around $1. 28 billion, with an average purchase price of $4,585 per Ethereum
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28747885710273?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Indian authorities bust scammers posing as support technicians in $15M scheme
data.description:
Indian authorities have busted a call center where scammers posed as support technicians, targeting victims globally. According to reports, the Directorate of Enforcement (ED) in Gurugram Zonal Office apprehended a group of youngsters when it busted the center. In the report, the Indian authorities mentioned that these scammers are responsible for cheating residents in the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/india-bust-scammers-posing-as-support-tech/

data.title: Early Bitcoin Holder Converts Assets to Ethereum in Major Transaction
data.description: According to PANews, a significant transaction has been observed by Lookonchain involving an early Bitcoin holder who transferred 6,000 Bitcoins, valued at approximately $689.5 million, to purchase Ethereum. The address has accumulated a total of 278,490 Ethereum, worth around $1.28 billion, with an average purchase price of $4,585 per Ethereum. Additionally, the holder maintains a long position of 135,265 Ethereum, valued at approximately $581 million.

data.title: How to Set Up a MetaMask Wallet in Under 10 Minutes
data.description:

The post How to Set Up a MetaMask Wallet in Under 10 Minutes first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Peter Thiel Bets on Ethereum as Wall Street's Preferred Platform
data.description: According to PANews, billionaire investor Peter Thiel is betting on Ethereum to become Wall Street's preferred platform for real-world assets (RWA). His investment firm, Founders Fund, has made significant investments in Ethereum-related assets and companies that use Ethereum as a reserve asset, including ETHZilla and Bitmine. Thiel's investment strategy is based on the belief that if Ethereum can serve as an alternative channel for clearing and settling dollars, stocks, and other assets outside the traditional financial system, its native token will benefit significantly from increased network activity. However, Nansen's research analyst Nicolai Søndergaard cautions that the notion of 'Wall Street rebuilding its financial infrastructure on Ethereum' may be more of a marketing ploy to attract investors to Ethereum-related stocks.

data.title: OpenAI Reaches Agreement with UK on ChatGPT Plus
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI has reached an agreement with the United Kingdom regarding ChatGPT Plus, as reported by Jinshi on August 24. This development marks a significant step in the collaboration between OpenAI and the UK, focusing on enhancing the capabilities and accessibility of ChatGPT Plus.

data.title: Iran ready to cut enrichment levels if EU and UK back off snapback sanctions
data.description:
Iran is now offering to roll back its uranium enrichment levels from 60% to 20%, but only if Britain and the European Union drop their plan to trigger United Nations snapback sanctions. This was reported by The Telegraph, citing senior Iranian officials close to the ongoing discussions. Tehran wants to avoid another round of military […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/iran-enrichment-levels-snapback-sanctions/

data.title: LayerZero wins Stargate takeover with 94% DAO approval in rare $120 million deal
data.description:
Cross-chain protocol LayerZero has announced the acquisition of multichain bridge Stargate Finance for $120 million worth of ZRO tokens. Stargate Finance DAO approved the deal with an overwhelming majority. The acquisition will see LayerZero and Stargate merge under one project, with ZRO becoming the official token for the two cross-chain protocols. 94% of Stargate Finance […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/layerzero-stargate-takeover-120-million-deal/
